node.statement: (Recovery: Choi's theorem via BP) Let Φ: M_{d_A} → M_{d_B} be CPTP, represented by Choi matrix J ∈ PSD_{d_A·d_B} with Tr_B(J) = I_{d_A}. The TP condition constitutes m = d_A² real constraints. By BP (Theorem 1), the face dimension r² ≤ d_A² gives Kraus rank r ≤ d_A, recovering Choi's 1975 theorem.
